description:
The combination of ultra-thin and air-in technology leads to ultimate rainfall experience,full cover the body and shower like massage.

 

This 16 Inch rainfall shower head is made of 304 stainless steel, durable and long lasting, work great even under low water pressure

 

this top spray shower head leak proof and rust resistance, ensuring corrosion resistance and durable,stainless steel material with seamless welded

 

360° Rotation connection ball, you can adjust the head angle casually, about 15° angle slope, let you have a variety of shower experiences

 

2.0GPM hand-held shower head, 2.5 GPM large stainless steel square rainfall shower head good performance even in low water pressure installations

 

Shower system all parts are separated by APE cushioning (pearl cotton) package to prevent damage in transit

 

Shower Head Width：16 inches

Shower Head Height：9.25 inches

Shower Arm Length：7.87 inches

Net Weight：12.62 lbs

Gross Weight：14.11 lbs

Package Dimensions：18.90x17.72x6.89 inches

Product Type:Complete Shower System

Shower Head Type:Adjustable shower head

Finish:Matte Black

Primary Material:Brass

Adjustable Spray Pattern:yes

Flow Rate (Gallons Per Minute):2.5 GPM

Adjustable Water Flow:YES

Shower Arm Included:YES

Hand Shower Included:YES

Installation Method:Ceiling-mounted

Item Package Quantity:1
